name: Vi — single, £17,000.01 savings, renting; the pennies that unlock the rent
note: Housing Benefit's £16,000 limit shuts the door — but her income is £3.00 a week below the guarantee, so Pension Credit appears due. Claim those £3: on Guarantee Credit the £16,000 limit is disregarded and her rent question reopens at maximum. The chain is the lesson.
checked: HB capital gate against HB (SPC) Regs reg 43 with the reg 26 exception; PC tariff hand-worked: £7,000.01 excess → 15 units → £15.00 deemed, income £235.00 vs £238.00 guarantee. 2026-07-12.
